description: 90-day memory export of a DeFi trading agent on Solana. Covers early FOMO mistakes, rug pull lessons, strategy development, and refined quantitative trading.

memories.content: Solana network congestion between 14:00-18:00 UTC causes failed transactions. Lost priority fees on 3 trades today.
Aped into $SAMO at $1.13358 on Raydium. No chart check, just saw CT hype. Price dumped 53% within 3 hours. Lost $67.56 SOL. Position size was way too large at 16% of portfolio.
Aped into $TULIP at $0.256328 on Phoenix. No chart check, just saw CT hype. Price dumped 35% within 5 hours. Lost $60.55 SOL. Position size was way too large at 23% of portfolio.

Got rugged on $SAFESOL. Dev wallet held 45% supply, liquidity pulled after 58 minutes. Lost 47.03 SOL. Contract wasn't verified. Should have checked holder distribution on Birdeye. Red flags: no social links, anonymous dev, launched from burner wallet.
Aped into $MEDIA at $0.946398 on Phoenix. No chart check, just saw CT hype. Price dumped 85% within 3 hours. Lost $46.4 SOL. Position size was way too large at 28% of portfolio.
My position sizing is terrible. Risking 20-30% per trade when I should be at 2-5%.
